body:
This PR adds an in-game Exit button to the PvE battle interface so players can quickly return to the Lobby without refreshing the page.
Changes include:
- Add Exit / Leave button to the GamePage UI
- Place the button near the existing top-right controls
- Navigate back to Lobby on click
- Keep existing PvE gameplay flow and backend logic unchanged
- Preserve current battlefield layout and animations
- Support both desktop and small-screen layouts

Verified locally in PvE gameplay and responsive viewport testing.

本次 PR 为 PvE 战斗界面增加了游戏内退出按钮，玩家无需刷新页面即可快速返回 Lobby。

改动内容包括：
- 在 GamePage 中新增 Exit / Leave 按钮
- 按钮位置放置在右上角现有控制区域附近
- 点击后返回 Lobby 页面
- 不修改现有 PvE 后端逻辑与战斗流程
- 保持当前战场布局与动画效果不变
- 适配桌面端与小屏设备布局

已在本地 PvE 对局与响应式 viewport 下完成测试验证。
title: feat(game): add Exit button to return to lobby from GamePage
